document.source_title: Why Punjab Kings are not bowling Chahal against left-handers in IPL 2026

claims.claim_text: Punjab Kings are not using Yuzvendra Chahal against left-handers due to match-up concerns.
claims.evidence_text: DC had two left-handers – Axar Patel and David Miller – controlling the chase through the middle overs, and PBKS seemingly felt Chahal was too risky an option against them.

metrics.evidence_text: In 48 innings against them, he has conceded 750 runs at an economy of 10.56.
